MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Vacated

Mtn To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Katelyn M. Knight, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP, (415-513-0477), for defendants & moving parties.
No appearance by Plaintiff.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs JAYNE YEE and DAVID YEE's Motion To Enforce Settlement is GRANTED. The settlement is final and binding. No evidence of fraud in the inducement. Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: D. Okazaki, Not Reported, D501.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Req.'S For Admission And Req. For Deemed Admissions And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Neal H. Konami, Esq. (415-274-0956), attorney for plaintiff/opposing party
Katelyn M. Knight, Esq. of Murchison & Cummin LLP (415-524-4300), attorney for defendant/moving party

Counsel submit without argument. Tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS JAYNE YEE and DAVID YEE's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admission And Request For Deemed Admissions And Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED in part and moot in part. Plaintiff shall provide a complete response to Form Interrogatory 17.1 within 10 days of notice of entry of order by personal delivery or overnight mail. Motion is moot as to requests for admissions. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $555. Written order is signed and filed in open court. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
